claims.summary: Quality gates and compressed history should not be mistaken for proof that meaning was preserved.
claims.disposition: Verified current diagnostics keep requested budget, residue texture, and semantic-integrity evidence distinct.

claims.summary: Sequential overlapping marker replacement can misattribute which raw artifact was removed.
claims.disposition: Implemented a deterministic single-pass longest-raw-marker scanner with exact original-position accounting.

claims.summary: Removing one marker must not synthesize a second marker that is then removed as if it were raw.
claims.disposition: Implemented no-second-pass cleanup and tests proving synthesized marker text remains semantic residue rather than disappearing.

claims.summary: Model profile or history-compression policy could be changed to preserve more meaning.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because those changes alter live prompt context and model response behavior.
